axes.name: Immune Homeostasis

domains.title: Regeneration & Repair System
domains.note: Domain 11 ใช้แกนซ้ำจาก Domain 6 (Axis 24–26) แต่แยกออกมาเพื่อเน้น functional regeneration pathway

conceptual_model.sequence: Axis 24 → เริ่มการซ่อม → Axis 25 → ตัดสินทิศทาง → Axis 26 → สร้างใหม่จริง
conceptual_model.core_question: ร่างกายจะหายจริง หรือจะกลายเป็นโรคเรื้อรัง

A.name: Protein Folding & Chaperone System
A.description: HSP70/HSP90, folding correction, misfold prevention

B.name: ER Stress & UPR Regulation
B.description: PERK/IRE1/ATF6, unfolded protein response, protein quality sensing

C.name: Misfolded Protein Detection & Tagging
C.description: ubiquitin-proteasome, ERAD pathway, protein triage decision

A.name: Autophagy
A.description: Lysosome System – autophagy flux, lysosomal degradation, organelle clearance

B.name: Protein Aggregation & Toxicity
B.description: amyloid, misfold accumulation, proteotoxic stress

C.name: Oxidative Protein Damage & Cellular Burden
C.description: ROS-induced protein damage, carbonyl stress, cellular toxicity load

axes.name: Cognitive-Emotional Loop Axis (CELA)

A.name: Loop Generation
A.description: amygdala+hippocampus trigger, stress/trauma/memory, thought+emotion pair output

B.name: Loop Reinforcement & Persistence
B.description: Default Mode Network activation, rumination, synaptic potentiation (LTP), identity attachment

C.name: Loop Clearance & Neuro
C.description: Immune Interface – mindfulness/meditation/cognitive restructuring + HPA-cortisol, IL-6/TNF-α, microbiome dysbiosis, mitochondrial ROS
